prompts.description: Generalize JSON import to accept TDA from all Solutions
prompts.notes: UniversalTDAImport.swift created with SolutionSource, UniversalTDAExperiment, TDADataset, LegacyFormatAdapter, UniversalDataLoader. Test JSONs for Pendulum Solver and Data Phi Sheaf added.

prompts.description: Add Nature environment backgrounds from Sachuest Point
prompts.notes: Procedural gradient skybox system delivered (placeholder phase per requirement 3 — real Sachuest captures swap in via texturePath when PHYS-VISION-002/004 land). EnvironmentManager: 4 presets (Ocean Sunset, Morning Mist, Night Sky, Coastal Day) with ObservableObject selection + loadRealEnvironment hook for equirectangular panoramas. ImmersiveBackgroundScene: inverted 50m sphere with UnlitMaterial; BakedSkyboxRenderer renders each preset's LinearGradient into a 2048x1024 equirectangular CGImage on CPU; texture-mode path ready for real panoramas. EnvironmentPreset.recommendedForeground computes Rec.709 luminance for readable chrome (requirement 5). This run wired the system end-to-end: PersistenceViewerApp now declares ImmersiveSpace(id: immersiveBackgroundID) and owns the shared EnvironmentManager; ContentView gains an Enter/Exit Nature View toolbar toggle (openImmersiveSpace/dismissImmersiveSpace), consumes the shared manager, applies recommendedForeground as .tint, and fixes the invalid 'squa.fill.circle' SF Symbol -> 'globe.americas.fill'. Sync-duplicate '* 2.swift' files NOT added. Build verification limited to swiftc -parse (visionOS 26.5 SDK + simulator runtime not installed in build env).

prompts.description: Implement hand gesture interaction for 3D persistence diagrams
prompts.notes: GestureRecorder.swift created with timestamped event capture for Golden Cipher restriction map. PointCloud3DView: pinch-select (TapGesture cycles through points), dragRotate + spreadZoom recording, selected point info panel. PersistenceDiagramView: spread-zoom via MagnificationGesture with scaleEffect, double-tap reset, tapAnnotate with annotation input field. PhaseSpaceTrajectoryView: slicing plane (X/Y/Z axis filter with threshold slider), dragRotate + spreadZoom recording. All events feed GestureRecorder for session export to assets/processed/vision_sessions/.

prompts.description: Phase space manipulation from SSEUQFT data
prompts.notes: PoincareSectionView: 2D Canvas scatter of trajectory points within epsilon=0.05 of slice plane, projects onto perpendicular axes with axis labels. Speed control: 0.5x/1x/2x/4x segmented picker, drives startAnimation() timer increment. SO(3) recording: dragRotate followed by so3Rotate event with full quaternion (qx,qy,qz,qw). SSEUQFT source label: dataSource param shows badge in header. GestureRecorder: so3Rotate, poincareSection, animationSpeed event types added.

prompts.description: Spatial audio — map Betti numbers to Shepard tones
prompts.notes: SpatialAudioEngine extended with AVAudioEnvironmentNode (HRTF) for per-feature 3D positioning. New API: sonifyFeature(at:dimension:lifetime:amplitudeScale:) places a mono Shepard buffer at a SIMD3<Float> world position; sonifyBirthDeathSequence(features:maxLifetime:) sweeps birth→death events with persistence-scaled sustain and ADSR envelope (attack transient on birth, release tail on death); updateListener(position:yaw:pitch:roll:) re-aims the HRTF listener. Procedural ocean wash via makeOceanAmbientBuffer: Voss-McCartney pink noise low-passed to surf rumble and modulated by 0.18 Hz/1.3 Hz LFOs, looped through the environment node behind the listener (startAmbient/stopAmbient toggled by ambientEnabled). PointCloud3DView gets new audioEngine state, a waveform-toggle that flips isActive and starts ambient, a play.circle button that drives the full birth/death sequence when persistenceFeatures is passed, and tap-select now calls sonifySelectedPoint which uses cached normalisedPositions (computed onAppear from pointCloud.simd3Points so audio source positions match the visible sphere positions). BettiCurvesView audio integration unchanged. Data Y Sheaf bridge in place (Sachuest field recordings will replace synthesized wash once PHYS-VISION-003 lands).

prompts.description: Build restriction map exporters to Golden Cipher and Witness
prompts.notes: SessionRecorder.swift: gaze (S2 azimuth/elevation, throttled 10Hz), hand positions (R3), navigation path, delegates gestures to GestureRecorder. RestrictionMapExporter.swift: writes three restriction maps — Golden Cipher (trajectory_*.jsonl with gesture+gaze+nav events), Witness (session_*.jsonl audit trail), Data Phi Sheaf (annotations_*.json). PersistenceViewerApp.swift: auto-exports on scenePhase .background via @StateObject SessionRecorder. ContentView.swift: toolbar menu with manual 'Export Session Now' trigger and confirmation alert.

prompts.description: Integrate with Sachuest Now as the initial calm experience
prompts.notes: SachuestWelcomeView.swift created as the root window (replaces direct ContentView mount in PersistenceViewerApp). Implements a three-phase SachuestWelcomePhase state machine — arriving (full-bleed Nature scene, 'Welcome to Sachuest', a gentle Begin affordance + Skip-to-data) → transition (opens the shared immersive skybox via openImmersiveSpace(immersiveBackgroundID), shows a poetic Nature→math bridge, holds ~2.2s) → exploring (the normal ContentView data space). Self-paced per requirement 3 (no timed gates beyond the optional transition hold). Sachuest Now bridge (requirement 4): SachuestHandoff Codable payload (environmentName, texturePath, source, createdAt) with a sachuest-now://session?env=&texture= deepLinkURL; handoffToSachuestNow writes handoff_latest.json to assets/processed/sachuest_now via SachuestHandoffWriter and opens the deep link, confirming via alert either way so the calm experience never dead-ends. Shared 3D environment assets (requirement 5): reuses the app-level EnvironmentManager + EnvironmentPreset skybox presets — the same gradients/textures that wrap the data space are what the handoff hands to the game. backdrop uses currentEnvironment.gradient and recommendedForeground for readable chrome. Build verification: visionOS 26.5 SDK present but only 26.1–26.4 simulator runtimes installed, so full xcodebuild is blocked; verified via swiftc -parse against XRSimulator26.5 SDK (exit 0 for both SachuestWelcomeView.swift and PersistenceViewerApp.swift) and confirmed all cross-file symbol references (immersiveBackgroundID, EnvironmentManager.recommendedForeground/gradient, SessionRecorder.exportSession, Coastal* tokens) exist. Also removed 140+ macOS iCloud sync-duplicate artifacts from the Solution tree.
